QA-05 -001 HIGH P1
Failed: Test qa05 footer copyright year is current
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa05_footer_copyright_year_is_current 🕐 2026-05-30 02:37:28 ⏱ 1.29s
📋 What this test was checking
Footer copyright must show the correct year (2026 per spec) — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Footer copyright must show the correct year (2026 per spec).
✗ What actually happened
Footer copyright year not found or incorrect: ''
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording

QA-05 -003 HIGH P1
Failed: Test qa05 hallucination no impossible success on wrong otp
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa05_hallucination_no_impossible_success_on_wrong_otp 🕐 2026-05-30 02:37:28 ⏱ 15.00s
📋 What this test was checking
Wrong OTP must NOT produce a login success message (hallucinated success). Note: 'Welcome back' is the modal *title* — it is shown before any login attempt, so we exclude it from the hallucinated-success phrase list. The test only flags phrases that imply a *completed* login — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
fill("000000") · TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE · TEST_USER_NAME
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Wrong OTP must NOT produce a login success message (hallucinated success).
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm

E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.goto: Timeout 15000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - navigating to "https://dev.mehadedu.com/en", waiting until "load"
